task_summary: Three patch fixes for v6.3.2: formalize UNCLEAR triage signal contract, add Java/.NET/Go Playwright detection in scaffolder, and harden test grep patterns with sed range extraction.
constraints: Preserve existing YAML frontmatter format exactly in all agent files
Maintain Goal > Expertise > Process > Constraints section order in agents
Do not change agent model assignments
Keep Block Comment Template format consistent across all skills
Tests must pass with set -euo pipefail
No new files — only modify existing files
CHANGELOG.md entry must follow Keep a Changelog format
success_criteria: triage-analyst.md defines explicit UNCLEAR token in output format that consuming skills can match
All three consuming skills (analyze-bug, fix-bugs, fix-ticket) use identical block comment format when triage returns UNCLEAR
scaffolder.md Batch 7 detects Playwright in Java (pom.xml/build.gradle), .NET (*.csproj), and Go (go.mod)
scaffolder.md generates language-appropriate e2e test files for Java, .NET, and Go
scaffolder-e2e-batch.sh uses sed range extraction instead of grep -A5 for Batch 7 section
scaffolder-e2e-batch.sh smoke test assertion is Batch-7-specific (not global grep)
All existing tests in tests/harness/run-tests.sh still pass
New test assertions for Java/Go/.NET Playwright detection pass
skip_rationale: Fully specified bugfix task with composite complexity 2, confidence 1.0. All file paths, exact changes, and patterns are documented in the roadmap. No research, brainstorming, or specification needed.

destructive_ops.evidence: Task modifies markdown agent definitions and shell test scripts only — no file deletion or data destruction

credential_handling.evidence: No credentials, secrets, API keys, or tokens are read, written, or transmitted in any of the target files

irreversible_side_effects.evidence: All changes are local markdown and shell script edits — no emails, notifications, or external API calls triggered

elevated_privileges.evidence: No sudo, chmod, chown, or any elevated privilege operations — pure text file edits in user workspace

ambiguous_scope.evidence: Scope is precisely bounded to 6 named files listed in the roadmap — no wildcard or unbounded operations

network_irreversibility.evidence: No DNS, CDN, firewall, load balancer, or webhook modifications — entirely local file changes

supply_chain_ops.evidence: No package publishing, container pushing, or registry operations — this is a plugin of markdown definitions

billing_quota_ops.evidence: No cloud resource provisioning, subscription changes, or quota modifications involved

system_service_effects.evidence: No systemd, cron, docker daemon, or firewall rule changes — only markdown and bash test script edits
